analyst_question_template: What is the out-degree of activity $ACT_X for object type $OT_A in the OC-DFG?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_activity(ocdfg.nodes, metric => metric.metrics[$OT_A].in_degree + metric.metrics[$OT_A].out_degree, tie_breaker => activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: What is the object frequency associated with activity $ACT_X for object type $OT_A?
Which activity has the maximum object frequency for object type $OT_A?
Does activity $ACT_X have a larger node weight than activity $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?
Does activity $ACT_X have a larger out-degree than activity $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?
Does activity $ACT_X have a larger in-degree than activity $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?
Which activities have positive node weight for object type $OT_A?
What is the edge weight of the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?
What is the $SIGMA edge duration of the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?
What is the $SIGMA waiting time on the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?
What is the $SIGMA sojourn time associated with the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?
Does the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y have positive edge weight for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_edge(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.source == $ACT_X and edge.object_type == $OT_A), metric => edge.weight, tie_breaker => target_activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Which incoming directed transition into activity $ACT_Y has the maximum edge weight for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_edge(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.target == $ACT_Y and edge.object_type == $OT_A), metric => edge.weight, tie_breaker => source_activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Which outgoing directed transitions from activity $ACT_X have positive edge weight for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: sorted(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.source == $ACT_X and edge.object_type == $OT_A and edge.weight > 0), order_by => target_activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Which incoming directed transitions into activity $ACT_Y have positive edge weight for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: sorted(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.target == $ACT_Y and edge.object_type == $OT_A and edge.weight > 0), order_by => source_activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Does the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y have larger edge weight than the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Z for object type $OT_A?
Is the $SIGMA edge duration of the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y greater than the $SIGMA edge duration of the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Z for object type $OT_A?
Is the $SIGMA waiting time of the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y greater than the $SIGMA waiting time of the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Z for object type $OT_A?
Which directed transition has the maximum $SIGMA edge duration for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_edge(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.object_type == $OT_A), metric => aggregate($SIGMA, edge.durations), tie_breaker => source_then_target_activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Which directed transition has the maximum $SIGMA waiting time for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_edge(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.object_type == $OT_A), metric => aggregate($SIGMA, edge.waiting_times), tie_breaker => source_then_target_activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: What is the $SIGMA value of numerical attribute $NET_ATT on the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?

formal_pattern: Maximum Aggregated Numerical Edge Attribute Selection
analyst_question_template: Which directed transition has the maximum $SIGMA value of numerical attribute $NET_ATT for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_edge(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.object_type == $OT_A), metric => aggregate($SIGMA, edge.attributes[$NET_ATT]), tie_breaker => source_then_target_activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Is the $SIGMA value of numerical attribute $NET_ATT on the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y greater than on the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Z for object type $OT_A?

formal_pattern: Aggregated Synchronization Latency Between Object Types
analyst_question_template: What is the $SIGMA synchronization latency between object type $OT_A and object type $OT_B at activity $ACT_X?
Which activity has the maximum $SIGMA synchronization latency between object type $OT_A and object type $OT_B?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_activity(event_table.activities, metric => aggregate($SIGMA, event_table.synchronization_latency(activity == activity, object_types == ($OT_A,$OT_B))), tie_breaker => activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Is the $SIGMA edge duration defined for the directed transition from $ACT_X to $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?

formal_pattern: Positive Aggregated Waiting Time Edge Set
analyst_question_template: Which directed transitions have positive $SIGMA waiting time for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: sorted(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.object_type == $OT_A and aggregate($SIGMA, edge.waiting_times) > 0), order_by => source_then_target_activity_name_ascending)

formal_pattern: Positive Aggregated Edge Duration Edge Set
analyst_question_template: Which directed transitions have positive $SIGMA edge duration for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: sorted(ocdfg.edges.filter(edge => edge.object_type == $OT_A and aggregate($SIGMA, edge.durations) > 0), order_by => source_then_target_activity_name_ascending)

formal_pattern: Directed Edge Sequence on Shortest Path
analyst_question_template: Which directed transitions occur on the shortest directed path from activity $ACT_X to activity $ACT_Y for object type $OT_A?

analyst_question_template: How many events at activity $ACT_X contain both object type $OT_A and object type $OT_B?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: count(ocel.events.filter(event => event.activity == $ACT_X and event.object_types.contains($OT_A) and event.object_types.contains($OT_B)))

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_activity(ocel.activities, metric => count(ocel.events.filter(event => event.activity == activity and event.object_types.contains($OT_A) and event.object_types.contains($OT_B))), tie_breaker => activity_name_ascending)

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_activity(ocel.activities, metric => object_interactions.convergence_degree(activity == activity, object_type == $OT_A), tie_breaker => activity_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Which activity has the maximum divergence degree for object type $OT_A?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_activity(ocel.activities, metric => object_interactions.divergence_degree(activity == activity, object_type == $OT_A), tie_breaker => activity_name_ascending)

formal_pattern: Synchronized Activity Set for Object-Type Pair
analyst_question_template: Which activities synchronize object type $OT_A and object type $OT_B?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: sorted(ocel.activities.filter(activity => exists(ocel.events.filter(event => event.activity == activity and event.object_types.contains($OT_A) and event.object_types.contains($OT_B)))))

formal_pattern: Object-Type Pair with Maximum Activity Co-Occurrence
analyst_question_template: Which object-type pair has the maximum co-occurrence frequency at activity $ACT_X?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: argmax_object_type_pair(all_object_type_pairs(ocel.object_types), metric => count(ocel.events.filter(event => event.activity == $ACT_X and event.object_types.contains(pair.first) and event.object_types.contains(pair.second))), tie_breaker => object_type_pair_name_ascending)

analyst_question_template: Is the co-occurrence frequency of object type $OT_A and object type $OT_B at activity $ACT_X greater than their co-occurrence frequency at activity $ACT_Y?

mathematical_assertion.lookup_path: count(ocel.events.filter(event => event.activity == $ACT_X and event.object_types.contains($OT_A) and event.object_types.contains($OT_B))) > count(ocel.events.filter(event => event.activity == $ACT_Y and event.object_types.contains($OT_A) and event.object_types.contains($OT_B)))
